metadata.task_title: Add a song to a playlist
metadata.instruction: Create the playlist "Fun with Kids" on Media Player and add Task ID 76.mp3 in Documents > Task 76 folder to the playlist.
metadata.context: I want to make a new playlist to organize my music better. I want to add "Baby Shark" video in my playlist.
